preamble:
Introduction The content of this service description (Chapter 1) is used to compile a service catalog that is used in the contract with the client. This introduction and document history below are for internal use only. It is allowed to merge Chapter 1 with other service descriptions into a single service catalog. Modifying the content of Chapter 1 for individual clients is not allowed. (If necessary, any adjustments can only be made with approval from the responsible service owner of product manager.) Version Date Comment Author 0.5 10-10-2023 1st Draft Ron Rigter 0.9 31-10-2023 Ready for Review Ron Rigter End of sale This service is end of sale. The service can still be used for customers where this service is already in use. The service can’t be used for new customers.
service_summary:
For email servers that are hosted within the Cegeka datacenter, Cegeka can offer anti-spam and anti-virus measures to protect incoming and outgoing email. The service is based on Cisco IronPort
SPAM filtering is the process of determining whether a given mail is unsollicited and reacting accordingly by deleting, quarantining, tagging this mail. Virus scanning is running the files, attached to a mail through a virus scanner, and blocking infected mails, to prevent viruses from entering the network. Virus scanning uses standard available anti-virus software, which is embedded in the email security gateway.
SPAM filtering uses a number of different techniques to determine whether mails are legitimate.
The customer can choose to use the standard policy configuration that Cegeka manages or can request to have a dedicated and specific policy to match (more or less stringent) requirements a customer has.
standard service components:
Cegeka shall be responsible in providing the following Services:
Security
The Service is certified against ISO27001. Processes for managing this service are part of the yearly ISAE3000 statement.
Patching & Lifecycle management
Cegeka performs patches according to the vendor's schedule.
Capacity Management
Cegeka performs proactive capacity management. When necessary, Cegeka performs upgrades on the central equipment.
eligibility and prerequisites:
Conditions The throttling is temporarily and only until the data flow traffic normalizes. Maintenance & Licenses Cegeka is responsible for the proper operation of the service. This includes the number of licenses and maintenance. Responsibility matrix | Activity | Customer | Cegeka | | | | | | | | | | | | |
Activity Customer Cegeka Monitoring & Reporting A monthly report will be made available on de Horizon Portal.
order & billing information:
Part numbers
O.0450_0010_0010_A_S.000 Secure mail gateway (IronPort) - including 5000 emails (in and out)
O.0450_0010_0020_A_S.000 Secure mail gateway (IronPort) - additional emails (per 100 in and out)
Measurement
A report is generated on a monthly basis, this report is based on the CMDB and lists all mailservers and will be made available on the Horizon Portal.
Billing
The units are billed against the price of their respective part numbers.
Changes
Changes are brought up through the normal service management process.
